summary: Diff mainly adds CSS for an authenticated scrolling watermark background pointing to a watermark logo path, plus updates to metadata/summary files. It does not add the required static image assets, and there is no direct code evidence that BrandLogo/header behavior or authenticated-only rendering has been wired up beyond the CSS class.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the full-color XOROOTS logo static asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png` so it loads at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png`, and ensure `BrandLogo` renders the image (not text fallback) when present.
missing_requirements.reason: No new files were added, and there is no evidence in the diff that the PNG exists under `frontend/public/assets/generated/` or that `BrandLogo` logic was updated/verified to render the image.
evidence: frontend/src/index.css (only adds background CSS; no BrandLogo changes shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a separate watermark-style logo asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` and use it for the authenticated scrolling background while keeping the header using `BRANDING.logo.src` unchanged.
missing_requirements.reason: The CSS references `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png`, but the diff adds no static asset file at the required path, and there is no evidence that the header continues to use `BRANDING.logo.src` unchanged (no header/branding code changes shown).

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the scrolling watermark background is subtle/readable in light and dark themes, stays behind content without blocking interactions, and appears only on authenticated pages (not the logged-out landing page).
missing_requirements.reason: CSS includes pointer-events:none, z-index, and theme-tuned opacity, but the diff provides no code evidence that the background is mounted only for authenticated pages and not shown on the landing page (no App/Landing code changes included).
evidence: file-diff shows no modifications to App/Landing components (only 3 modified files: index.css, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json)

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in the BuildRequest (non-goal: no new dashboard features/behavior changes beyond watermark asset/style). The only actual code diff shown is CSS; these unrelated changes appear as claims in a summary file.
